title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Brûlée, Luffy as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's coming again!! SWERVE to the left, jinbe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAAA AHA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: UWOH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KeyAAA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Smoothie...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The ship is going to sink...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you get any bigger than this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...They're so tenacious....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: THAT DAMN JINBE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huff-in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't let your guard down yet! I believe in your navigational command!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be okay!! I'm taking respondi- Billy for this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I wonder if Luffy's won yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if Sanji's arrived yet... sorry that I slept for so long!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Little Sis! Do nekomamushi and Inuarashi also transform like that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji- San Will Contact Us if Anything Happens!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if that woman is a giant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you, pudding- chan. You were a great help to us until the very end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Stop littt it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Move Ober!! Move Uber to Zat Side, Sanji-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everybody will think that we're a married couple!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huff... Huff...:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy is going to appear right in the middle of multiple squads and fleets...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who exactly are you imitating...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I will definitely save my captain....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 6/9,year

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe that so many of the siblings are gathered here on cacao Island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just how wary of straw hat luffy are they!?

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: Where are all your mirrors?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've thrown them all away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Brother oven, are you serious about this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's like a festival here.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This seems like it's going to be fun! Kyaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Charlotte family, the 36-40th sons the 30-34th daughters DECUPLETS

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut it. You guys have no- thing better to do anyway, right? Just follow the plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be able to disband in an hour and a half.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is quite troublesome without the help of the telekinetic sea slugs...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've arrived! How many tens of thousands of people does the enemy have!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Less than 10 people are expected.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What!? I'm going to sleep!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: T/N: A JOCONDE SPONGE IS A type of almond- flavored sponge cake.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wake me up if something happens!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 32nd son of the Charlotte family BROWNE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The big mom name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: is weeping..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 27th daughter of the Charlotte family JOCONDE*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The worst generation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 25th son of the Charlotte family (former sweet commander) SNACK - @600,000,000

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
